title: Animated Yellow Lizard Totem
description: A CIT resource pack to add an animated yellow lizard totem from Rain World with a custom pop sound.
body:
# Animated Yellow Lizard Totem Of Undying

This resource pack adds the yellow lizard from [Rain World by Videocult](https://rainworldgame.com/) as a totem of undying

Uses CIT to make it spin so make sure you have a mod that interprets CIT installed ([Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle), [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) etc.)

![Lizard when popping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cda380760e209942f7e9732ade30ad62dbbadd94_0.webp)
